code: import axios from'axios';const BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000/api';export const MEDIA=process.env.REACT_APP_MEDIA_URL||'http://localhost:8000';const API=axios.create({baseURL:BASE});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('adminToken');if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});export default API;
